methodology_summary: Prudent Reviews physically buys and uses each product for weeks to years, running real-world use tests (cooking, cleaning, cutting) alongside controlled instrumented experiments such as heat-conduction and heat-retention timing with surface thermometers. For categories that are impractical to fully test (large appliances, paint), they supplement with structured expert interviews, and they retain tested products as long-term benchmarks against future competitors.
conflict_of_interest_notes: The methodology page discloses that brands occasionally send free samples and that most such offers are declined; when accepted, the site states it reviews the product the same as a purchased one and will report negative findings. No explicit affiliate-link or commission disclosure appeared in the fetched text (disclosures are commonly placed in page footers, which are stripped before analysis) — this should be verified directly on the site before being treated as an unmonetized source.

planet.note: No environmental impact, sustainability, or materials-footprint content found in the fetched pages.

people_supply_chain.note: Reports country of manufacture and general raw-material sourcing regions (e.g. steel from Kentucky/Pennsylvania suppliers, assembly in Italy/France), but no labor conditions, factory audits, or worker welfare information.

quality.note: Extensive instrumented, real-world testing: heat conduction/retention measurements, multi-year use, structured cross-brand comparisons.

value.note: Explicit price-vs-competitor positioning and buy/don't-buy guidance tied directly to test results.

transparency.note: Dedicated, detailed methodology page; named individual reviewer; published raw data tables across many competing products; structured, disclosed testing protocols.

trust_tier_rationale: Demonstrates repeatable, instrumented testing (documented boil-time and heat-retention tables across 15+ competing pans) plus a structured, blinded customer-service experiment across 9 brands — practices well beyond marketing claims. The main gaps are the absence of a visible monetization disclosure in the fetched text and no coverage of environmental or labor-ethics pillars.
verifiability: Numeric results (boil times, retention temperatures) are published in comparison tables against many named competing products using a stated, repeatable protocol (same water volume, heat setting, timing), so a third party could rerun the same test. The underlying photos and raw data are the site's own and are not independently audited.
